name: Lentil Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lentils, onion, garlic, and white wine in a large bowl.
2. Simmer for 3 minutes over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and stir in basil, thyme, parsley, lemon juice, and oil until well combined.
4. Add tomato wedges.
5. Spoon the salad onto individual lettuce leaves to serve.
